content.en:
I don't know if it's because of the birth of the ancestral monument, the cultivation environment of the universe is getting better and better, and cultivation is getting easier and easier.

In the past, if the Ten Star Earth Venerable wanted to become a god general, he not only needed a strong inheritance, countless resources, and a certain amount of luck and talent.

Taken together, it is too difficult and too difficult to give birth to a god general.

But now, it's much easier to become a god.

For example, the Great Dao Enlightenment is much easier than in the past, many gods and generals have comprehended the Origin Realm to the Perfection Realm, and the Earth Venerables can easily comprehend the Great Dao to the Origin Realm, and they don't even need too many resources.

Moreover, physical cultivation and soul cultivation have also become easier.

In just tens of thousands of years, more than 20 god generals were born in the two universes, among which the human race gave birth to three god generals, namely Kunwu God General, Mixed Yuan God General and God Blade God General.

The talents of these three people themselves are the best in the human race, and now that the cultivation environment is good, they will naturally make rapid progress.

In addition to the birth of three god generals, the human race also gave birth to some earth deities above eight or nine stars.

And the members of the Heavenly Pavilion have also made great progress, for example, Zhou Tian has become a ten-star earth venerable, and he is in an extremely powerful column among the ten star earth venerables.

Although Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and Ye Yu had countless resources, their foundation was still a little worse at the beginning, and although they made up for it a lot in the later stage, they still couldn't compare with the real top geniuses.

Therefore, the two of them have only become nine-star earth venerables so far, and it may not be difficult to become a ten-star earth venerable, but it is too difficult to become a god general.

In the past, Ye Tian was worried that they would not be able to transcend and would fall as the universe shattered, but now he is not worried.

The dual universe will 100% become a great universe, even if it is not detached, you can continue to cultivate and become the true ancestor of the Heavenly Mandate Realm or even the Great Dao Realm, and the great universe will hardly be broken, if it becomes the Dao realm, it will exist almost eternal.

Therefore, he naturally did not worry about them.

As long as he continues to grow stronger, he can always protect them and protect the human race.

Due to the birth of the ancestral monument, Ye Tian is the first on the list of god generals, so his strength has improved rapidly in the past tens of thousands of years, not only creating the sixth form of the Heavenly Sword Series - Endless Sword Realm, but also creating the sixth form of the Hunyuan system - Hunyuan Ring!

The power of these two major moves is very terrifying, which makes Ye Tian's strength increase a lot, and Ye Tian's progress on the avenue is also very great, and he has already figured out the way to condense the prototype of the avenue, although he has not yet started, but he has an idea, as long as he makes another grade of progress, he can officially start to condense the prototype of the avenue.

Once it reached that level, Ye Tian's strength would inevitably skyrocket many times.

On the list of god generals, Ye Tian is still the first on the list of god generals, and has reached the late stage of the four-star combat power, which is infinitely close to the four-star peak god general.

The Phantom Feather God General has been promoted to the middle of the three-star stage, and several early-stage three-star God generals have been born, but their progress is still not great, after all, it is very difficult for the God General above three stars to be promoted to every small level, even if the cultivation environment is very good now, it is not so easy to improve.

After his strength was improved to a four-star late-stage god general, and his physical body was improved a lot, Ye Tian entered the Ancient Demon Tower again, barely broke through the seventh layer of the Ancient Demon Tower, and obtained a lot of ancient demon essence essence to refine his body, and his strength went further, but he was still a little short of a four-star peak god general.

His strength has been raised to this level, and it will take a long time for Ye Tian to improve a little more, and even some opportunities will not be of much use to him.

As a result, Ye Tian began to travel all over the universe, copying the talents of countless living beings, trying to improve his talents.

Although this process was difficult and difficult, Ye Tian still persisted.

10,000 years!

100,000 years!

200,000 years!

......

Ye Tian didn't know how many talents he had copied and fused, because there were already countless of them, and even sometimes he felt that his talent could not improve, and he could hardly detect the progress.

But he still replicates and fuses, replicates and fuses......

After going on until 500,000, Ye Tian's talent finally ushered in the final transformation.

Of course, it is not all the talents that have been transformed, but the source force talent, which corresponds to the strength talent, and the strength talent is the basic talent, many living beings have the strength talent, and the god-level strength talent is also the most common talent, the largest number, and the power talent fused by Ye Tian is naturally the most.

The fusion of billions of god-level talents made Ye Tian's source power talent finally transform to the super god level.

Rumble!!!!

The unimaginable transformation and soul pain have occurred, but fortunately, Ye Tian has strong perseverance and is naturally not afraid of this pain.

Soon, the fusion was completed, and Ye Tian's source force talent was completely transformed.

Source Force Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Seeing this line of talent, Ye Tian smiled happily, his source power talent was not only super god level, but also an extreme talent.

The transformation of Yuan Li's talent also improved Ye Tian's strength a little, completely breaking the shackles.

Originally, Ye Tian had made a lot of progress in these 500,000 miles, and he had already stepped into the four-star peak combat power, and had reached the true limit of the four-star peak, and he was only a trace away from the five-star god general.

And now, the source force talent has stepped into the super god-level talent, the shackles have been broken, and the strength has reached the level of a five-star god general, and the strength has truly completed the transformation.

"Five-star god general, it's finally reached!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

In the next 100,000 years, Ye Tian successively raised all the source speed talents and source body talents to the super god level, which can be regarded as completely stable at the level of the early five-star god general.

It's a pity that it is more difficult for other talents to be fused and promoted to the super god level, because not everyone has other talents, and attribute talents involve rules, and it is naturally more difficult to break the shackles of rules than basic talents.

Ye Tian felt that he wanted to raise these attribute talents to the super god level before the universe stepped into the great universe.

At this time.

The new universe is already incomparably huge, and it has surpassed the Cangyu Universe and the Eternal Universe.

The human race has been relocating some starry sky continents one after another to integrate into the new universe, and other forces are also relocating, after all, the cultivation environment of the new universe has surpassed the Cangyu Universe and the Cangyu Universe now, who still wants to stay in the Wangu Universe and the Cangyu Universe?

In the blink of an eye, there were only tens of thousands of years left before the final fusion period of the dual universes.

This is a critical moment, and if you don't try to transcend at this time, it will be too difficult and too difficult to transcend from the great universe in the future.

If you don't detach from the Great Universe, although you can always cultivate, it is equivalent to being shackled by the Great Universe, and you can't leave the Great Universe.

If you can't live in the big universe for a lifetime, many people may not be able to do it.

Therefore, if you want to transcend, you must prepare for these tens of thousands of years, otherwise you will lose the last chance.

this day.

In the Cangyu Universe, the Phantom Feather God will announce that he will try to transcend on the same day.

And the strength of the Phantom Feather Divine General is only a three-star peak divine general, in the eyes of others, the Phantom Feather Divine General is also a rebel, and the combat power of the three-star peak divine general should be able to transcend success.

However, Ye Tian and the others knew very well that the three-star peak god general was estimated to be unable to survive the catastrophe of the transcendent.

However, many gods and earth lords still came to the Cangyu universe to watch the Phantom Feather God General transcend the catastrophe.
